notes: 1. Deploy Apps Script as Web App (Anyone, even anonymous)
2. Copy the Web App URL to scriptUrl field
3. Set ADMIN_KEY in Script Properties (NOT in code): File > Project Properties > Script Properties
4. Never commit the real admin key to GitHub
5. Admin Key is entered in the browser on first login and stored in localStorage
6. After login, a signed session token is used for all API calls (8h expiry)
